name: migration: each migrated rule gets a `source_file:` field pointing to its new location (per §2.1 schema)
command:
mkdir -p rubric tree && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: x
    description: x
    detector: x
    provenance: [{source: google-tsguide, class: published-standard, section_id: 5.2, url: https://google.github.io, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]
' > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD" --emit-tree "$PWD/tree" && grep -E 'source_file: generated-code-quality-standards/google/tsguide.yaml' tree/google/tsguide.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
